products.title: Photography Masterclass (Online)
products.desc: The full TooAmple photography programme, recorded — camera fundamentals, studio lighting, posing, direction and delivery. Learn at your own pace, lifetime access.

products.title: Video Editing Crash Course
products.desc: Edit like a working professional — Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve workflows, grading, sound design and delivery specs for clients and social.

products.title: Signature Lightroom Presets
products.desc: The exact looks from the TooAmple portfolio — warm skin tones, deep cinematic shadows, built for Nigerian light. Desktop and mobile versions included.

products.title: Outdoor Presets for Photoshop
products.desc: Golden-hour warmth, clean greens and rich skin tones for outdoor sessions — camera raw presets that work in Photoshop and Lightroom.

products.title: Cinematic Colour Grade Pack (LUTs)
products.desc: Feature-film colour in one click — teal & amber, moody Lagos night, clean commercial. Works in Premiere, Resolve, Final Cut and CapCut.

products.title: Studio Lighting Guide (PDF)
products.desc: Every core studio setup we use, diagrammed — one-light portraits to full commercial rigs, with power settings, modifiers and positioning.

products.title: A Photographer's Guide to Building Wealth
products.desc: Pricing, packaging, client pipelines and retainers — the business systems behind a profitable studio in the Nigerian market.

products.title: Electronic Press Kit Template
products.desc: A clean, editable press kit template for creatives — present your work, rates and contact professionally to brands and clients.
